title: trifolium maritimum subsp. cinctum
intro: Trifolium maritimum subsp. cinctum, also known as the Maritime Clover or Sea Clover, is a plant species that belongs to the legume family and is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, which are used to treat various health conditions, including urinary problems and skin irritations. The health benefits of Trifolium maritimum subsp. cinctum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a modern herbal remedy.
